Class ImageResourceParameter

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter<BufferedImage>
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.ImageResourceParameter
public class ImageResourceParameter extends Parameter<BufferedImage>
Overrides the parse(String) method to read the image at the given path relative to the resources folder.
See Also:

    Reads the image at the given path relative to the resources folder.

  • Constructor Details

    • ImageResourceParameter

      public ImageResourceParameter()

  • Method Details

    • parse

      public Optional<BufferedImage> parse(String valueString)

      Reads the image at the given path relative to the resources folder.

      Parameter format: /folder/file.png or "/folder/file.png"

      Recognized image formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WBMP, TIF, TIFF, GIF*

      * GIF files can technically be read but only the first frame of the GIF is actually stored.

      Special cases:

      • Logs a warning and returns an empty Optional if there is no file at the given path in resources, or if an IOException is caught
      Specified by:
      parse in class Parameter<BufferedImage>
      Parameters:
      valueString - the path to the image file relative to the resources folder
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the read image as a BufferedImage object, or an empty Optional if there is no file at the given path in resources, or if an IOException is caught
      See Also:
      • ImageIO.read(InputStream)
